news.title: AI sets date when Nvidia stock will hit $10 trillion market cap
news.text: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA), the biggest beneficiary of the artificial intelligence boom, closed the Friday session with a market capitalization of approximately $4.663 trillion.

news.title: Nvidia Owns This Under-the-Radar $20 Stock Poised to Disrupt a $1.8 Trillion Market
news.text: Artificial intelligence technology giant Nvidia owns a handful of promising stocks. One of these holdings is helping lead the charge of change for an industry that could use a cost-reducing revamp.

news.title: The Biggest Risk to Nvidia's Stock Price That Almost Nobody Is Talking About
news.text: Nvidia's revenue has exploded alongside the AI boom, but its fate is tied to the massive capital expenditures of just a handful of big tech companies. Big tech has deferred the true cost of AI spending, and when those expenses hit earnings, companies may be pressured to cut back on chip orders.

news.title: Nvidia's Market Cap Just Fell Below $5 Trillion. Here's Why It's a Buying Opportunity
news.text: Nvidia's dominance in the GPU market looks almost insurmountable. AI infrastructure spending should increase meaningfully, providing a nice tailwind to the company.
